title: SPLIT Entry Plug inside the 3rd Angel
display_title: SPLIT Entry Plug inside the 3rd Angel
wikitext:
[]: SPLIT: Entry Plug inside the 3rd Angel?             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Mar 17, 2011 4:26 pm Split (...kind of) from here because this topic is too interesting to pass up. ~ SSD Azathoth wrote: And Mari's complete lack of compunction about stabbing the Angel right in the plug suggests to me that she either believes it's a dummy plug or is even more headfucked than she seems. Paragon wrote: It could be a dummy plug, but they still hadn't been used anywhere else before, and still had "a lot of problems". I hope the people at Bethany base wouldn't be foolish enough to put a problematic system in an angel. As for Mari being screwed up for attacking the plug (if it contained a pilot), keep in mind the only other comparison for a similar situation is with Shinji and Bardiel, and Shinji's...a little soft, I guess you could say. I imagine the pilot in the other plug would be pretty contaminated by the angel after it woke up, if Mari knew this, she might not have any qualms "saving" the pilot from being infected that way.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 17, 2011 4:39 pm Azathoth wrote: 1) never be directly shown to us 2) explain half the plot 3) be very, very relevant to some aspect of Mari's character.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Thu Mar 17, 2011 4:45 pm Well, who knows, there might be hints coming down the pike for what happened at Bethany. Or there might not.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Mar 27, 2011 7:33 pm I suspect the answer to Tunniel's Entry Plug is in this scene , which was storyboarded but then cut. Notice that Seele speaks about the fusion of an Angel with an Eva, and then about the fusion of an Angel with a human being. It not only explains why the Third Angel had an entry plug- they were using it as an experiment to fuse an Angel with a human being- it also explains why the whole of Bethany Base was constructed, Evangelion and all, to guard the Third Angel. If the crap hit the fan while they were trying their Angel-Human merger, the whole elaborate containment system would hold the Angel in check while Eva-05 chased it down and got rid of it. They needed Eva-05 to dispose of the Angel, or possibly the Angel-Human hybrid within the base, and not at Tokyo-3 where the full extent of Seele's dirtywork would become apparent- not just to Nerv, but to the general public as well.

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Sun Mar 27, 2011 8:11 pm UrsusArctos wrote: Notice that Seele speaks about the fusion of an Angel with an Eva, and then about the fusion of an Angel with a human being. It not only explains why the Third Angel had an entry plug- they were using it as an experiment to fuse an Angel with a human being- it also explains why the whole of Bethany Base was constructed, Evangelion and all, to guard the Third Angel. If the crap hit the fan while they were trying their Angel-Human merger, the whole elaborate containment system would hold the Angel in check while Eva-05 chased it down and got rid of it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 27, 2011 8:17 pm That's some interesting stuff, Ursus, and I'll have to put it in my cranial spin cycle. One thing to consider, though, is that the official designation of Tunni's plug is Pseudo Entry Plug for 3rd Angel Control Test . "Control" as in "suppression" or "restraint", and "test" as in a study. Also note the "pseudo" in front of the "entry plug" -- what is "false" about it? The most straightforward implications of the thing: it creates a break in Tunniel's spinal cord (which is otherwise still intact, amazingly), theoretically interrupting neuronal impulses and blah blah blah... I'm almost tempted to think that Tunni a testbed for the technology later used on the Evas, but if that's so then Bethany Base would have been essentially unprotected for a while. If the Angel wasn't used for developing Eva-related technology, then I guess the implication is that Seele were interested in controlling normal Angels? For whatever reason, this makes me consider Keel's cut line here: Reichu wrote: Keel: As planned[1], Eva Unit 03 fulfilled its role as a medium[2] for the 9th Angel. ?: As planned, the fusion of Angel and Eva was possible. ?: And we've learned that, with Eva as the catalyst, even merging with us humans is possible.

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Sun Mar 27, 2011 8:22 pm Reichu wrote: But why control Angels at all? Don't Seele want to kill them all as part of their "contract with Lilith"? Is there anything to be gleaned from the weird lines in the cut Seele scene suggesting that the children are performing specialized functions for the human colony organism (for the sake of bringing about HIP, of course)?

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun Mar 27, 2011 8:32 pm qu4d wrote: To get control of HIP? Zeruel merged with Eva-00 and so he could bypass the self destruction mechanism of the central/terminal dogma.

[]:             Quote Post by Strayn » Mon Mar 28, 2011 12:05 am Could someone please post a cap of the entry plug on the Third Angel? I never could find it.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 28, 2011 12:11 am

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Mar 28, 2011 6:36 am I'm squinting to see it, but it looks a lot like Mark.06's spear, the one used to "shut down" Eva-01's God Mode. Tunniel was probably used to make the Mark.06, with its "unusual construction" controllable. It also raises the probability that the Mark.06 isn't so much an Eva but a rebuilt Angel.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 28, 2011 7:02 am UrsusArctos wrote: I'm squinting to see it

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Mar 28, 2011 8:12 am That energy circulation system must be pretty powerful to allow Tunnely to do as much damage as he did. Aside from that, it seems like the plug is directly linked with energy circulation. Perhaps the whole purpose of the pseudo-plug system is to tame the Angel by regulating its energy use? (If Kaji let loose the controls on the energy circulation, it'd explain why Tunniel went on a rampage)

[]:             Quote Post by Strayn » Fri Apr 01, 2011 9:30 am Reichu wrote: Here, let me fix that for you... SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 05, 2011 9:52 pm Strayn wrote: Nice picture. Looks like they were trying to pilot an angel like an EVA.
